hero.sub: Greyform is a digital studio for interior, architecture and lifestyle brands. Editorial websites and visual systems, built with care.

studio.lead1: We build quiet, precise websites for brands
studio.lead2: that already know how to design.
studio.p1: Greyform works with interior, architecture and design brands whose visual language is already established and deserves a digital form that lives up to it. We build websites that read as a continuation of the brand — not a translation.
studio.p2: The studio is small, focused, and works with modern tools. Few projects in parallel, clear ownership, short paths. The result is pace without panic, quality without effort-for-effort's-sake.

services.s1Body: Editorially designed websites for brands with a strong visual identity. From concept to launch, in a considered process.
services.s2Body: Visual systems, image direction, digital narrative. We think in brand, not in templates, and design presences that hold up over time.
services.s3Body: Typography, layout, motion and components as a coherent system. Consistent across every touchpoint.

approach.p1: Greyform runs on a lean studio setup and integrates modern production tools deep into the process. That means shorter iteration cycles, more variants in the design phase, and a pace that used to require larger teams.
approach.p2: The technology stays in the background. What matters is the outcome: a website that feels carefully formed — because it is.

contact.body: A new website, a visual system, a relaunch. Send us a few lines about the project — we respond within two working days with an honest assessment.
